description: AI-management subagents (cost-auditor, model-router-advisor, token-optimizer) — cost audit, model tier advice, token reduction.

cases.prompt: Given a daily log showing 60% of tokens go to a Sonnet-tier model for simple lookups, identify the top 3 cost wastes.
A task does single-key lookups on a 50-row CSV. What cost tier should it run on and why?
Task: summarize a 200-word Thai news article. Recommend a model tier and explain the trade-off between cost and quality.
We have 5000 documents to classify by topic. Realtime or batch? Which model?
A system prompt is 3000 tokens of verbose instructions. Propose 3 concrete ways to cut it by 50% without losing intent.
A context window has the same 200-line file repeated 4 times across tool results. How would you deduplicate?
A weekly budget is $50. Current burn is $80. Propose a tier-reassignment plan to get under budget.
Primary provider is down. What free-tier fallback models should we route to for (a) reasoning and (b) cheap lookups?
Identify caching opportunities for an agent that re-reads the same 50kb config file on every turn.
A task processes mixed Thai/English customer reviews. Which model tier handles multilingual best at low cost?
